channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Brian May's 1970s Career: Guitar Innovations and Academic Pursuits
item.description: This article explores Brian May's transformative journey during the 1970s as he evolved from a postgraduate physics student into one of rock music's most iconic guitarists. As the sonic architect of Q...

item.title: Controversial influencer Andrew Tate and brother arrested in US following UK charges
item.description: Controversial influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan have been arrested in the United States following new charges brought by British authorities. The Crown Prosecution Service (CPS) has charg...

item.title: Opposition protests government's invitation to rebel TMC MPs during all-party meeting
item.description: The opposition parties staged a symbolic walkout from the all-party meeting convened by the Centre on Sunday, protesting the government's decision to invite the Nationalist Congress Party (India) (NCP...

item.title: Ontario Premier Visits Thunder Bay Amid Nearly 200 Active Forest Fires
item.description: The article reports that Ontario Premier Doug Ford visited Thunder Bay to address the growing wildfire crisis, with nearly 200 forest fires burning across the province. The situation has prompted emer...

item.title: Cabinet Secretary Warns Schools Against Unapproved Levies on Parents
item.description: Education Cabinet Secretary Migos Ogamba has issued a stern warning to school principals against collecting unapproved levies from parents. During Education Day celebrations at Mbiriri Comprehensive S...

item.title: US Marshals arrest Andrew and Tristan Tate over alleged rape and human trafficking charges as UK seeks extradition
item.description: The US Marshals Service arrested Andrew and Tristan Tate on July 18, 2026, as the Crown Prosecution Service (CPS) of the UK prepares to seek their extradition for new charges including rape, bodily ha...

item.title: Christopher Nolan’s 'The Odyssey' Cast and Characters Explained
item.description: The Hollywood Reporter provides a detailed overview of the cast and characters featured in Christopher Nolan’s adaptation of Homer’s epic poem, 'The Odyssey.' The film follows Odysseus, played by Matt...

item.title: AI Mistake Leads to Data Loss in Tech Sector
item.description: A recent incident involving artificial intelligence has sparked concerns about data security and corporate accountability. The event, linked to a misconfiguration in AI systems, resulted in unintended...

item.title: Narikurava Children Use Puppetry to Highlight Environmental Issues
item.description: A year-long puppetry project titled 'Enge Engal Nadhigal' by Agai — Theatre of Voices involves children from the Narikurava community in Pallavaram as storytellers, addressing environmental degradatio...

item.title: Five-Year-Old Reo Tanaka Found Dead in River After Missing for a Month
item.description: A five-year-old boy, Reo Tanaka, was reported missing on June 21 after vanishing from a hot spring facility in Kirishima, Japan. His parents last saw him around 3:30pm that day during a family visit t...

item.title: Timi Dakolo Files Legal Action Against DJ Timmy Over Debt Dispute And Defamation Claims
item.description: Nigerian gospel singer Timi Dakolo has threatened legal action against DJ Timmy over claims of a £4,106 debt linked to a proposed UK tour. In a detailed letter signed by his lawyer, Dakolo denies the ...

item.title: Nuclear Disarmament Voyage: 22,000+ Miles for a Radiation-Free Future
item.description: The article discusses a 22,000+ mile voyage organized by the Nuclear Information and Resource Service (NIRS) to promote nuclear disarmament and advocate for a radiation-free environment. The initiativ...

item.title: ODM and UDA Coalition Aims for Ruto's 2027 Re-Election
item.description: ODM chairperson Gladys Wanga has projected that a combined vote share between ODM and the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) would guarantee President William Ruto a second term in the 2027 General Elec...

item.title: Andrew Tate and brother face multiple charges including rape and sex trafficking in Miami arrest
item.description: Radical social media influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan were arrested in Miami by US marshals, as Britain seeks their extradition to face charges of rape, sex trafficking, and assault. The...

item.title: Defenders Use Prompt Injections to Halt AI Hacking Agents
item.description: Researchers from Tracebit have discovered that placing prompt injections alongside sensitive data in cloud environments can effectively stop AI hacking agents. By embedding forbidden commands into dec...

item.title: Oriire School Abduction: Teacher Shares Harrowing 56-Day Captivity Experience
item.description: A teacher from Oriire recounted the traumatic experience of being abducted along with students during a May 15 incident. The captives, including staff and pupils, were held by ISWAP militants for 56 d...

item.title: Will Smith's hair loss sparks public reaction following marital incident
item.description: Will Smith has become the subject of widespread public discussion after his hair loss, which some speculate may be linked to a recent marital incident involving his wife, Jada Pinkett Smith. The incid...

item.title: Filipino Spaghetti as a Symbol of Cultural Identity Through Culinary Fusion
item.description: The article argues that Filipino spaghetti, despite its foreign origins, embodies the essence of Filipino identity through its adaptation and transformation of foreign ingredients into a uniquely Fili...

item.title: Bahrain's Sunken Boeing 747 Becomes Abandoned Underwater Attraction
item.description: In 2019, Bahrain announced plans to submerge a Boeing 747 aircraft into the sea to create an underwater diving attraction and marine habitat. The project involved dismantling the plane, transporting i...

item.title: Lynas Rare Earths overcomes global challenges in market resilience
item.description: The article details how Lynas Rare Earths navigated significant obstacles over the past decade, including China's economic pressures, intense political activism in Malaysia, and a failed takeover atte...
